_comment: BNB HACK 2026 Track 1 eligible BEP-20 token universe. Source: https://dorahacks.io/hackathon/bnbhack-twt-cmc/detail (the competition detail page publishes the fixed 149-token list verbatim). Source snapshot: 2026-06-12 14:48 UTC. Trades outside this list do not count. core/eligibility.py loads this file and core/eligibility.py::filter_universe() must be applied to every trade universe before execution. If the contest page updates the list, update this file and bump _schema_version. Tests in tests/unit/test_eligibility.py pin the file to the source page and check that every token in our config (basket_symbols, dex_universe_symbols, bsc_tokens) is a subset of this list.
_duplicate_note: The DoraHacks page lists SLX twice. We keep a single entry above. If the contest judges see the SLX token count as 149 (counting the dup), our universe is still a strict subset.
